name: Herbed Millet (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chopped parsley and snipped chives
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, stir the millet over medium heat until seeds turn golden. Stir continuously to prevent burning.
2. Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the boiling water. Add 1/2 teaspoon of salt and 1 tablespoon of butter.
3. Cover and cook over low heat for 15 to 20 minutes or until millet is tender. Stir in the additional butter, pepper to taste, parsley, and chives. Fluff with forks and serve immediately.
4. Alternatively, let the millet stand, covered, for 15 minutes. Then add the butter and herbs and serve.
If cooked in advance, store covered in the refrigerator for up to 2 days. Reheat in a microwave oven or covered at 250 degrees in an oven. Fluff before stirring in butter and herbs.
